name: Scaling & Polishing
tagline: Professional cleaning for healthy gums and a brighter smile.
summary: Removes hardened tartar above and below the gumline using ultrasonic scaling, then polishes away surface stains from coffee, tea, and tobacco.

name: Tooth-Coloured Fillings
tagline: Restore cavities with composite that matches your natural tooth.
summary: Composite (tooth-coloured) fillings repair decay, cracks, and minor fractures while preserving natural tooth structure. Glass ionomer fillings — which release fluoride — are also available.

name: Tooth Extraction
tagline: Painless removal when a tooth can no longer be saved.
summary: Simple and surgical extractions performed under local anaesthesia. Includes wisdom tooth removal, with detailed aftercare and replacement planning.

name: Dental Crowns & Bridges
tagline: Durable restorations that look and feel natural.
summary: Zirconia and PFM crowns to restore weakened or damaged teeth, plus bridges to replace missing teeth and stop neighbouring teeth from drifting.

name: Dentures
tagline: Custom-made replacements for multiple missing teeth.
summary: Complete, partial, and implant-supported dentures designed to fit comfortably, restore chewing and speech, and bring back your confident smile.

name: Veneers & Laminates
tagline: Transform stained, chipped, or uneven teeth into a confident smile.
summary: Porcelain and composite veneers, plus ultra-thin no-prep laminates. Custom shells bonded to the front of teeth to correct colour, shape, and minor alignment.

name: Braces
tagline: Effective, reliable correction for moderate to complex cases.
summary: Fixed metal braces gently move teeth into proper alignment using continuous, gentle pressure. Suitable for crowding, spacing, and bite issues.

name: Clear Aligners
tagline: Nearly invisible, removable trays that straighten teeth discreetly.
summary: Custom-made transparent aligners replaced every 1–2 weeks. Removable for eating and brushing, ideal for teens and working professionals with mild to moderate cases.

name: Pit & Fissure Sealants
tagline: Painless cavity prevention for molars — reduces decay risk by up to 80%.
summary: Thin protective coatings painted onto the deep grooves of molars and premolars where toothbrushes can't reach. Quick, painless, and lasts 3–10 years.

name: Fluoride Varnish
tagline: A quick, painless coating that strengthens enamel and fights cavities.
summary: Concentrated fluoride coating painted onto teeth. Strengthens enamel, remineralises weak areas, slows cavity-causing bacteria, and helps stop early decay. Safe for toddlers, children, and adults.

name: Pulp Therapy (Kids)
tagline: Saves baby teeth from severe decay or infection.
summary: A gentle alternative to extraction for baby teeth. Pulpotomy and pulpectomy clean infected pulp tissue and restore the tooth — keeping it functional until it falls out naturally.

name: Pediatric Dental Crowns
tagline: Stainless steel and zirconia crowns that protect damaged baby teeth.
summary: Tooth-shaped caps for severely decayed or fractured baby teeth. Includes durable stainless steel, tooth-coloured zirconia, and natural-looking strip crowns for front teeth.
benefits: Lasts until the tooth falls out

name: Space Maintainers
tagline: Holds the gap when a baby tooth is lost too early.
summary: Small fixed or removable appliances that keep the space open for the permanent tooth — preventing crowding and reducing the need for braces later.

name: Mouth Guards for Kids
tagline: Custom protection for sports and orthodontic patients.
summary: Custom-fitted mouth guards absorb impact and prevent broken or knocked-out teeth, lip and tongue cuts, and jaw injuries. Essential for contact sports and kids in braces.

name: Dental Trauma (Kids)
tagline: Same-day care for chipped, knocked-out, or displaced teeth.
summary: Emergency response for falls, sports injuries, and accidents. Quick action — within 30–60 minutes for permanent teeth — gives the best chance of saving the tooth.

name: Diet Counselling (Kids)
tagline: Personalised guidance to prevent early-childhood cavities.
summary: A paediatric dentist evaluates your child's eating habits and provides personalised guidance — from snacking patterns to bottle feeding to tooth-friendly meal planning.
contentFile: Diet Counselling by a Paediatric Dentist.md
